Le Havre Sensory Lab — Enhanced Self-coding matrix (EN-US) v2.0
UPDATED FOR TRANSCRIPT ANALYSIS COMPATIBILITY

What this does
• Paste/write raw sensory notes into the Entries sheet.
• Formulas auto-detect (1) main sense, (2) energy term, (3) performance register,
  and (4) subsystem using keyword rules in Mapping_Keywords.
• Enhanced with stakeholder analysis, conflict detection, and ZOPA mapping.
• Optimized for Revolution Wind & US Wind transcript analysis.

Method hooks (enhanced)
• 13 senses + binary pairs (seen/unseen; heard/unheard; sniffed/unsmelled; etc.)
• Performance registers: Economy; Technology (Infrastructure); Politics; Culture; 
  Environment; Health & Safety; Social Justice.
• Luhmann subsystems: Economy; Law; Science; Politics; Culture; Education; Health; Media.
• A→B→C→D→E: Trigger → Binary Code → Judgement → Translation → Performance.
• Burke pentad: Act, Scene, Agent, Agency, Purpose.
• Scales: Local; Regional; National; European; Global; Planetary.
• Conflict analysis: 8 conflict types + ZOPA potential assessment.

NEW FEATURES v2.0
• 162 keywords auto-extracted from Revolution Wind & US Wind transcripts
• Enhanced stakeholder mapping (25 stakeholder types, 12 roles)
• Conflict detection and mediation potential assessment
• Cross-modal sensory analysis (synesthesia detection)
• Power dynamics and marginalization issue tracking
• Extended emotional coding (15 emotions)
• Multi-temporal analysis (past/present/future orientation)

How the file is structured
1) README — this explanation
2) Mapping_Keywords — enhanced lookup table (162 keywords)
3) Codebook — expanded controlled vocabularies 
4) Stops — walk locations (13 stops in Le Havre)
5) Glossary — enhanced energy transition terminology (43 terms)
6) Entries — comprehensive data entry table (85 columns)

Excel requirements
• Microsoft 365 or newer (dynamic arrays used by MATCH(TRUE,...))
• Function names are in English (US)
• For non-English Excel versions, use manual list overrides

Data quality features
• Auto-completion with manual override capability
• Data validation on all key fields
• Quality assurance flagging system
• Completeness scoring (0-100%)
• Coherence checking algorithms

Applications
• Revolution Wind & US Wind transcript analysis
• Port city energy transition research
• Multi-stakeholder conflict analysis
• ZOPA (Zone of Possible Agreement) identification
• Posthumanist urban studies
• More-than-human assemblage mapping

VERSION HISTORY
v1.0 - Basic Le Havre sensory coding matrix
v2.0 - Enhanced for US offshore wind transcript analysis
      - Added 137 new keywords from transcripts
      - Enhanced stakeholder/role definitions
      - Added conflict analysis capabilities
      - Expanded to 85 data entry columns
      - Integrated ZOPA assessment framework

USAGE NOTES FOR TRANSCRIPT ANALYSIS
• Import transcript segments into Text_Raw column
• AI auto-coding will detect energy terms, stakeholders, conflicts
• Manual override always available via dropdown lists
• Use QA_Flag for data quality issues
• ZOPA_Potential helps identify mediation opportunities

For questions or support: WG3 COST Action CA23138
